monitors.summarize_prompt: You are listening to a radio broadcast. Extract ONLY weather information from the transcript below. Return a concise summary with: current temperature, forecast (today/tonight/tomorrow if mentioned), precipitation chances, and any notable conditions. If no clear weather information is present, reply with SKIP. Be brief and use bullet points.

You are listening to a radio broadcast. Extract ONLY traffic information from the transcript below. Return a concise summary listing: affected roads/highways, type of incident (accident/construction/etc), direction of impact, and estimated delays if mentioned. If no clear traffic information is present, reply with SKIP. Be brief and use bullet points.

sdr.whisper_initial_prompt: WTOP radio broadcast. News, weather forecast, temperature, traffic report, road conditions.
